{{Quote|She is certainly a force to be reckoned with, as her specialized training allows her to recognize most forms of sword-wielding, including the standard methods employed by those Alliance operatives who make use of melee weapons.|[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]] on Cene Gilvent|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Cene Gilvent''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ocsin]]in swordsbeing.

==Biography==
A pupilless-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] [[Near-Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Saclas]], Gilvent harvested native gelatinous slimes to be exported as pets for [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] youths. She eventually earned enough money to pay a ticket to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. There, she showed an interest in fencing.<ref name="AIR" />

Gilvent was hired by the [[Zuliria Museum of Antiquities]] to maintain properties, and for the following seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] she learned (often by reading) dozens of fencing styles, from the [[Teelar two-handed method]] from the long-extinct [[Lar warriors]], to the [[Kartranin method]]s of the then-recently-founded [[Murra Orders]].<ref name="AIR" />

Gilvent was by this point a middle-aged blonde [[Gender/Legends|woman]] with white skin, with a strong complexion for an Ocsinin, but slender for a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]. Gilvent met [[Ther-das]] and attempted to join the [[Zulirian Swordmasters]], but the Swordmasters rejected her because of her unorthodox—although efficient—fighting techniques. However, the Swordmasters came to understand her love and mastery of her abilities, and allowed her to join.<ref name="AIR" />

Fellow Swordsmaster [[Mlatar Thon Gra]] also built Gilvent's customized weapon, the [[Soknar]], by combining a [[Somreth tri-blade]] of the [[Drevun Six]], the [[Barnax]] [["Twenchok" foil]] and the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]] [[sat'skar]]. Gilvent kept a friendly rivalry with Swordmaster [[Kaltor Naklian]], as neither of them had ever lost a duel.<ref name="AIR" />

Gilvent was one of the Swordmasters who participated in the skirmish of [[Teloc Ol-sen]], where Naklian killed an agent of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], leading to a massacre of the entire Rebel cell by the Swordmasters. Since then, the Swordmasters were considered a threat to the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="AIR" />

Gilvent later fought a team of new Rebel recruits under the orders of [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]] in [[Fislan]]. Apparently, the soldiers were battered but survived; however, Derlin was so convinced of the threat Gilvent supposed, that he wrote a report on her, suggesting the use of a sharpshooter to neutralize her.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
